display.purpose: Page titles only. One per screen.

headline.purpose: Section headings, modal titles, card group labels.

title.purpose: Card titles, list item primary text, form section heads.

body.purpose: All prose content, form descriptions, narrative fields. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, navigation items, status text.

shadows.name: contained
shadows.purpose: Cards and grouped content panels only. Separates a content block from the page. The only shadow step in this system.

motion.name: ease-direct
motion.purpose: All state transitions. 100-150ms duration. Responsive and direct — felt but not watched.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action on any screen. Station Red background, 44px minimum height.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; background: #DB4038; color: #FAFAFA; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #C73930; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FFFFFF, 0 0 0 4px #DB4038; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #B83329; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Canvas background, Rule Line border. Used alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #171717; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #F5F5F5; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FFFFFF, 0 0 0 4px #DB4038; } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary in-context action. Transparent at rest; reveals Field Gray on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; background: transparent; color: #171717; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F5F5F5; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FFFFFF, 0 0 0 4px #DB4038; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with label. 44px height, 16px font to prevent iOS auto-zoom.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #171717; line-height: 1; } .ds-input { display: flex; height: 44px; width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #171717; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #737373; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #DB4038; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(219, 64, 56, 0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. Canvas surface, Rule Line border, single structural shadow.
components.html:
Apparatus Status

Station 1 fleet

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #171717; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0; color: #171717; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #737373; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { padding: 0 24px 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Apparatus Status Card
components.description: Tappable card for cycling apparatus status. The most-used interactive element in the product.
components.html:
Engine 1Type I Attack Engine
Available
components.css: .ds-app-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-app-card:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-app-card:active { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-app-content { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; min-height: 72px; } .ds-app-dot { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-app-available .ds-app-dot { background: #22C55E; } .ds-app-available .ds-app-status { color: #15803D; } .ds-app-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-app-name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; color: #171717; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-app-type { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: #737373; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-app-status { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline status indicator. Always paired: colored dot + text label.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-badge-clear { color: #15803D; } .ds-badge-clear .ds-badge-dot { background: #22C55E; } .ds-badge-response { color: #92400E; } .ds-badge-response .ds-badge-dot { background: #FACC15; } .ds-badge-oos { color: #B91C1C; } .ds-badge-oos .ds-badge-dot { background: #EF4444; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky app header. Canvas background, Rule Line bottom border. Brand mark in Station Red.
components.html: VFD Platform
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 20; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 16px; background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E5E5; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #DB4038; } .ds-nav-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

components.name: Caution Banner
components.description: Offline-mode and sync-warning alert. Always visible when offline; never dismissible mid-session.
components.html: Offline Changes will sync when connection is restored.
components.css: .ds-caution { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #FEF9C3; color: #92400E; border: 1px solid #FDE047; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-caution-label { font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
A visual system built to the same standard as a standing operating procedure. Nothing decorates. Nothing surprises. Every element is where it belongs because that is where it always is. The system earns trust by being identical at 8am and 2am, in good conditions and bad.

This is software used under pressure: post-incident logging, apparatus dispatch, shift handover at the end of an exhausting call. The visual language responds to that reality with high contrast, clear hierarchy, generous touch targets, and immediate feedback. It does not compete with the work; it supports it. A firefighter completes a task and returns to readiness without having thought about the interface.

The reference direction is government digital services (GOV.UK, USDS) and professional field operations tools (Procore, ServiceMax) — institutional polish, nothing wasted, nothing missing. Not startup minimalism, which mistakes sparse for serious. Not legacy fire software (Paladin), which mistakes cluttered for capable.
keyCharacteristics: Near-achromatic neutral palette; Station Red reserved for action and status only
Inter across all weights — function over typographic expression
Flat surfaces at rest; structural shadow signals containment only
44px touch targets as a hard floor on every interactive element
Transitions at 100-150ms ease-out; responsive and direct, no choreography

rules.name: The Station Red Rule
rules.body: Red is reserved for action (primary buttons, links, focus rings) and system state (destructive, error). Never used as a background fill on extended surfaces, never used decoratively, never combined with another saturated hue on the same screen.

rules.name: The Status Pair Rule
rules.body: Status colors never stand alone. Every status indicator pairs a colored dot with a text label. Color-blind users read the label; sighted users read the color. Both paths work.

rules.name: The Plain English Rule
rules.body: Every visible string must be the shortest phrase the user would naturally say aloud. 'Log Incident' not 'Create NERIS Record'. 'Out of Service' not 'OOS'. 'Sign In' not 'Authenticate'. No jargon survives without a plain-English companion.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The single shadow step (0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05)) exists to mark containment, not to create visual drama. If a new component requires more than shadow-sm to feel grounded, the problem is color or spacing, not shadow depth.

rules.name: The 44 Rule
rules.body: No interactive element falls below 44px in its smallest dimension. Inputs, buttons, icon buttons, status cards — all 44px minimum. This is non-negotiable.

dos: Do reserve Station Red for action and status. Its rarity is what makes it readable.
Do pair every status color with a text label. Never communicate state through color alone.
Do maintain 44px as the absolute minimum for every interactive element.
Do use Inter weight contrast (400/500/600/700) to build hierarchy before reaching for size changes.
Do keep transitions at 100-150ms with cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1). Responsive, not theatrical.
Do write every label in plain English at the shortest natural phrasing.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to disable transitions for users who have opted out.
Do target WCAG AA contrast minimums: 4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text and UI components.
donts: Don't use SaaS-bold aesthetics: oversized hero metrics, gradient accents, celebration animations.
Don't use consumer app patterns: bottom tab nav carousels, onboarding mascots, pull-to-reveal easter eggs.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid color only.
Don't use colored border-left stripes on cards, list items, or callouts as accent decoration.
Don't use Paladin-style visual density: competing text sizes, colored table rows, icon overload.
Don't use generic admin dashboard patterns: navy sidebars, hero-metric blocks, identical card grids.
Don't apply shadow-md or shadow-lg. One shadow step exists in this system.
Don't use Station Red as a background fill on extended surfaces.
Don't introduce a second accent color. The palette is intentionally minimal.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding, margin). Animate opacity and transform only.
